businessQuestion: Which markdown clearance events resulted in selling products below cost?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    FMC.CLEARANCE_CATEGORY,
    FMC.MARKDOWN_DEPTH_PCT,
    FMC.MARKDOWN_DOLLAR_IMPACT,
    FMC.COST_RECOVERY_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_MARKDOWN_CLEARANCE FMC
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
ON FMC.PRODUCT_KEY=DP.PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE FMC.BELOW_COST_FLAG=1
ORDER BY FMC.MARKDOWN_DOLLAR_IMPACT DESC;
businessContext: Pricing teams want to evaluate whether aggressive markdowns are hurting profitability.
